productDisplayName: Puma Women Tazon White Black Blue Shoe
description: With a clean vamp, tonal stitch details throughout, and a unique formstripe finish, the puma Tazon II has a sporty silhouette that's perfect for every day wear. Team this up jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic uppers for protection and durability Tonal stitch details throughout for added style Unique formstripe finish on the sides for added structure Mesh tongue for superior breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Appliqued logo on the tongue to create a fashion statement Embroidered cat logo on the toe box to enhance style Midsole CM-EVA midsole for extra comfort, cushioning and shock absorption Outsole Two-tone rubber outsole with TPU lugs for extra durability Diamond pattern outsole for extra grip
